# PERF-040-per-func negative: each function samples time.Now at most once
lang: go
file: PERF-040-per-func-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"time"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func Stamp(c *gin.Context) {
	now := time.Now()
	_ = now
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"ok": true})
}

func Expire(c *gin.Context) {
	deadline := time.Now().Add(time.Minute)
	_ = deadline
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"ok": true})
}
